title: Methods accept empty-string IDs without local validation
description: 13+ create/update methods embed string IDs directly into JSON without checking for empty string. Affected: message_create (chat_id), chat_create (contact_id/space_id/name/member elements), space_create (name), space_ban_create (space_id/user_id), space_invite_create (space_id), read_position_update (both IDs), presence_status_update (id), message_update (id), chat_update (id), space_update (id), chat_contact_update (id), push_subscription_create (device_client_id/url). Contrast: message_query, message_destroy, etc. all guard properly. Pattern: slice operations guard, single-ID mutating operations do not.
close_reason: Added is_empty() guards to 13 method functions across message.rs, chat.rs, space.rs, space_ban.rs, space_invite.rs, contact.rs, misc.rs; all tests pass
